arguments.new_str:
from django.db import models
from django.core.validators import MinValueValidator, MaxValueValidator
from django.db.models import Avg

class Product(models.Model):
    name = models.CharField(max_length=200)
    description = models.TextField()
    price = models.DecimalField(max_digits=10, decimal_places=2)
    stock = models.IntegerField(default=0)
    created_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True)
    
    # Review fields
    average_rating = models.DecimalField(
        max_digits=3,
        decimal_places=2,
        default=0.00,
        validators=[MinValueValidator(0.00), MaxValueValidator(5.00)],
        help_text="Average rating from all reviews"
    )
    review_count = models.IntegerField(
        default=0,
        help_text="Total number of reviews"
    )
    
    def __str__(self):
        return self.name
    
    def recalculate_rating(self):
        """Recalculate average rating from related reviews.
        
        This should be called after reviews are added/updated/deleted.
        The actual update logic should be in the Review model's save/delete methods.
        """
        # This will be used by Review model via product.recalculate_rating()
        from django.db.models import Count, Avg
        
        stats = self.reviews.aggregate(
            avg_rating=Avg('rating'),
            total_reviews=Count('id')
        )
        
        self.average_rating = stats['avg_rating'] or 0.00
        self.review_count = stats['total_reviews'] or 0
        self.save(update_fields=['average_rating', 'review_count'])
    
    @property
    def has_reviews(self):
        """Check if product has any reviews."""
        return self.review_count > 0
    
    @property
    def rating_display(self):
        """Get formatted rating for display."""
        if self.has_reviews:
            return f"{self.average_rating:.1f} ({self.review_count} reviews)"
        return "No reviews yet"

arguments.message: Product model updated with review fields successfully. Added average_rating and review_count fields with validators and help text. Implemented recalculate_rating() method for updating ratings, has_reviews property, and rating_display property. Created and applied migration 0002_product_reviews. All changes contained within src/products/ directory. Note: Review model should call product.recalculate_rating() when reviews change.
